title: Data races related to libimage events
body:
After introduction of libimage events I can see dataraces caught by sanitizer:

```
podman pull quay.io/boson/faas-nodejs-builder                                                                                            ST 15   post-img-event 
==================
```

comments.body: Thanks!  I think I could decrypt the output.
